'''âdh-sh-f-k''' ('''kadhashfekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:evangelise|evangelise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:evangelise|evangelise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-sh-f-k
|-
! Lemma
| kadhashfekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhashfekoko|thidhashfekoko]] || [[word:jidhashfekoko|jidhashfekoko]] || [[word:shidhashfekoko|shidhashfekoko]] || [[word:kidhashfekoko|kidhashfekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhashfekoko|thuthudhashfekoko]] || [[word:jujudhashfekoko|jujudhashfekoko]] || [[word:shushudhashfekoko|shushudhashfekoko]] || [[word:kukudhashfekoko|kukudhashfekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhashfekoko|thudhashfekoko]] || [[word:judhashfekoko|judhashfekoko]] || [[word:shudhashfekoko|shudhashfekoko]] || [[word:kudhashfekoko|kudhashfekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhashfekoko|thudhashfekoko]] || [[word:judhashfekoko|judhashfekoko]] || [[word:shudhashfekoko|shudhashfekoko]] || [[word:kudhashfekoko|kudhashfekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhashfekoko|thedhashfekoko]] || [[word:jedhashfekoko|jedhashfekoko]] || [[word:shedhashfekoko|shedhashfekoko]] || [[word:kedhashfekoko|kedhashfekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhashfekoko|thothodhashfekoko]] || [[word:jojodhashfekoko|jojodhashfekoko]] || [[word:shoshodhashfekoko|shoshodhashfekoko]] || [[word:kokodhashfekoko|kokodhashfekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhashfekoko|thodhashfekoko]] || [[word:jodhashfekoko|jodhashfekoko]] || [[word:shodhashfekoko|shodhashfekoko]] || [[word:kodhashfekoko|kodhashfekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhashfekoko|thodhashfekoko]] || [[word:jodhashfekoko|jodhashfekoko]] || [[word:shodhashfekoko|shodhashfekoko]] || [[word:kodhashfekoko|kodhashfekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhashfekoko|thĂŠdhashfekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhashfekoko|jĂŠdhashfekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhashfekoko|shĂŠdhashfekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhashfekoko|kĂŠdhashfekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhashfekoko|thathadhashfekoko]] || [[word:jajadhashfekoko|jajadhashfekoko]] || [[word:shashadhashfekoko|shashadhashfekoko]] || [[word:kakadhashfekoko|kakadhashfekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhashfekoko|thadhashfekoko]] || [[word:jadhashfekoko|jadhashfekoko]] || [[word:shadhashfekoko|shadhashfekoko]] || [[word:kadhashfekoko|kadhashfekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhashfekoko|thadhashfekoko]] || [[word:jadhashfekoko|jadhashfekoko]] || [[word:shadhashfekoko|shadhashfekoko]] || [[word:kadhashfekoko|kadhashfekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhashfekithi|shadhashfekithi]] || [[word:shadhashfekiji|shadhashfekiji]] || [[word:shadhashfekishi|shadhashfekishi]] || [[word:shadhashfekiki|shadhashfekiki]]
